creator: y7v81xhon@mozmail.com
text:
Created attachment 232828
Chosen options using make config for emacs-devel

In FreeBSD STABLE/13,
emacs-devel in ports using FLAVOR=nox and the specified options fails to build with the follwing (piece) of log:


'../src/emacs' -batch --no-site-file --no-site-lisp --eval '(setq
load-prefer-newer t)'  \
-l comp -f batch-byte+native-compile international/emoji.el
'../src/emacs' -batch --no-site-file --no-site-lisp --eval '(setq
load-prefer-newer t)'  \
-l comp -f batch-byte+native-compile international/isearch-x.el
'../src/emacs' -batch --no-site-file --no-site-lisp --eval '(setq
load-prefer-newer t)'  \
-l comp -f batch-byte+native-compile international/iso-ascii.el
